## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `perf` ‚Äî performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî tooling, dependencies, maintenance

## Target branch

> [!WARNING]
> This PR must target `dev`. PRs opened against `main` will not be merged ‚Äî see [Branch workflow](README.md#branch-workflow).
